description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind-CI that runs on push to main, pull requests to main, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has three jobs: Formatting, CPU, and two GPU jobs (GPU-Nvidia and GPU-AMD). The CPU job runs on ubuntu-24.04 and macos-latest, with multiple build configurations and test suites. The GPU jobs run on ubuntu-24.04 and configure CUDA and HIP environments for Nvidia and AMD GPUs respectively.
